title: Amendment to Circular No. 31/05/2018-GST on Proper officer under sections 73 and 74 of CGST Act
text: Circular No. 239/33/2024-GST dated 4th December 2024 amends Circular No. 31/05/2018-GST regarding proper officers under Sections 73 and 74 of CGST Act. It empowers Additional Commissioners and Joint Commissioners of specified Central Tax Commissionerates with All India Jurisdiction for adjudication of show cause notices issued by DGGI. Notification No. 27/2024-Central Tax dated 25th November 2024 substituted Table V to empower more officers. For DGGI cases with multiple noticees across jurisdictions, the show cause notice may be adjudicated by Additional/Joint Commissioner of the Commissionerate where the noticee with highest tax demand is located. Prior pending SCNs may be transferred via corrigendum to empowered officers.
